# /pr Command

Create a pull request for the current branch.

## Usage

```
/pr <title>
/pr <title> --draft
```

## Examples

```
/pr fix: update image tag replacement in pipeline
/pr feat: add NI calculation to tax endpoint
/pr chore: remove debug steps --draft
```

## What this command does

1. Checks current branch name and recent commits
2. Creates a PR to main with a clear title and description
3. Reports the PR URL

## Workflow

```bash
# Create PR
gh pr create \
  --title "<title>" \
  --body "<auto-generated description based on commits>" \
  --base main

# For draft PR
gh pr create \
  --title "<title>" \
  --body "<description>" \
  --base main \
  --draft
```

## PR body template

```markdown
## Summary
<brief description of what changed and why>

## Changes
- <change 1>
- <change 2>

## Testing
- [ ] Unit tests pass
- [ ] Checkov scan clean
- [ ] Terraform plan reviewed

## Notes
<any additional context>
```
